data.title: JOYSTAR Kids Bike for Ages 2-12 Years Old Boys Girls, 12-20 Inch BMX Style Kid's Bikes with Training Wheels, Children Bicycle

features: DESIGN FOR KIDS - 1. This Kids bike comes with stable training wheel early rider. 2.Quick release seat simplify the height adjustment. 3.Saddle with holder to learn riding when the training wheel is off. 4.Foot brake suitable for young rider don't have enough power to manipulate the hand brake.
MINIMUM MAINTENANCE - Made of premium steel to survive the bumps of learning
the durable steel frame is backed by our limited lifetime warranty. The bike comes with black tire & single speed
only little maintenance needed due to the simple design.
DIY DECAL & SAFE CHAIN GURAD - Your child will get a DIY decal
they could make a unique bike with the decal by sticking their name on the frame or chain guard. The chain guard well protects the chain
it will last longer than other bikes
your child will not get hurt when try to touch the chain.
EASY TO INSTALL - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools
normally takes a novice about 20 minutes to assemble it. If you have problem about assembly or the bike
RECOMMENDED SIZE CHART - 12" BIKE FOR 2-4 YEARS (33"-41") TODDLER
18" bike for 5-9 years (43"-59") boys & girls. Note: child height may vary even at the same age
please take the height into consideration.

relatedProducts.Title: vollsch BMX Style 12 14 16 Inch Kids Bike Training Wheels 20'' Bicycle with Kickstand for 2-14 Years Old Toddlers Boys Girls
relatedProducts.Features: Intended for Kids: Our BMX style toddlers bike caters specifically to novice riders embarking on their cycling journey. It features safety training wheels for balance (while the 20-inch bicycle only has a kickstand), along with an adjustable seat to accommodate your child's development | Superior Quality: Crafted from high carbon steel, the bike frame is designed to withstand the rigors of uneven terrain without bending or breaking, offering essential safety for your child's adventures. Its robust construction and straightforward design ensure minimal maintenance needs | Safety and Sturdiness: The trusty coaster brake is perfect for toddlers who might not have the muscle power for hand brakes yet. The full chain guard keeps little fingers safe from getting caught in the chain. And those big 12 x 2.4-inch tires give a great grip to stop any slipping while they're riding | Easy Installation: The bike arrives with 85% of the assembly already completed, accompanied by essential assembly tools. By following our installation guide video and instructions, you will only need to attach a few components, which should take roughly 20 minutes to finish the final assembly process | Ensure Proper Fit: The 12-inch bike fits children 32 - 38 inches tall, aged 1 - 4 years. The 14-inch is ideal for kids 35 - 43 inches, aged 3 - 5 years. The 16-inch bike is designed for children 40 - 51 inches tall, suitable for ages 4 - 8 years. The 20-inch fits big kids 48 - 60 inches tall, aged over 8 years

Sections.Title: Watch your little ones' confidence soar as they ride VOLLSCH kids bicycles.
Texts: 12 inch: 10.6kg (23 lb) 14 inch: 11.8kg (26 lb) 16 inch: 12.9kg (28 lb) 20 inch: 13.8kg (30 lb)
